headline: COIN Lags Industry YTD, Trades at Premium: What Should Investors Do?
summary: COIN shares trail the industry in 2026 despite crypto expansion plans. Its rich valuation, falling earnings estimates and market risks cloud the outlook.

headline: Jim Cramer on Coinbase Global: “What I Would Suggest You Do Is Just Buy Bitcoin, It’s Cleaner”
summary: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ:COIN) is one of the stocks on which Jim Cramer expressed his thoughts. Answering a caller’s query about the stock, Cramer said: Well, I’ll tell you, I think that it, a lot of people just think it’s a play on Bitcoin. And what I would suggest you do is just buy Bitcoin. […]

headline: After 144 Years In New Jersey, Exxon Mobil Plans Texas Redomicile, Joining Tesla And Coinbase
summary: Exxon Mobil plans to move its legal headquarters from New Jersey to Texas after 144 years, citing the state's business-friendly environment.

raw.headline: After 144 Years In New Jersey, Exxon Mobil Plans Texas Redomicile, Joining Tesla And Coinbase
raw.summary: Exxon Mobil plans to move its legal headquarters from New Jersey to Texas after 144 years, citing the state's business-friendly environment.

headline: Senator Angela Alsobrooks Says 'Compromise' On Stablecoin Rewards Issue Being Worked Out: 'Don't Let Perfect Be The Enemy Of Good'
summary: Angela Alsobrooks called for a compromise on the issue of stablecoin rewards, emphasizing that perfect should not be the "enemy" of the good.

raw.headline: Senator Angela Alsobrooks Says 'Compromise' On Stablecoin Rewards Issue Being Worked Out: 'Don't Let Perfect Be The Enemy Of Good'

headline: Kalshi Faces Setback As Court Rules Ohio Regulators, Not CFTC, Hold Jurisdiction Over Sports-Related Contracts
summary: A federal judge denied Kalshi's bid for a preliminary injunction against Ohio regulators on Monday, March 11, holding that the platform failed to establish CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction over its sports-event contracts.

raw.headline: Kalshi Faces Setback As Court Rules Ohio Regulators, Not CFTC, Hold Jurisdiction Over Sports-Related Contracts
raw.summary: A federal judge denied Kalshi's bid for a preliminary injunction against Ohio regulators on Monday, March 11, holding that the platform failed to establish CFTC's exclusive jurisdiction over its sports-event contracts.
